name: msitarzewski
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        msitarzewski /

      agency-agents  

    
      A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
summary: 该项目是一个集成多种专业AI智能体的完整代理平台，能一站式提供从前端开发到社区运营等多样化服务，值得关注因其将不同领域的AI能力模块化并赋予个性与流程，大幅提升了自动化任务的灵活性和完成度。

name: diegosouzapw
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        diegosouzapw /

      OmniRoute  

    
      Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
summary: OmniRoute 是一个免费的 AI 网关，能通过单一接口连接 230 多家 AI 服务提供商，并利用智能压缩技术显著节省使用成本。

name: agents-cli
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        google /

      agents-cli  

    
      The CLI and skills that turn any coding assistant into an expert at creating, evaluating, and deploying AI agents on Google Cloud.
summary: 该项目是一个命令行工具集，能将任意代码助手转变为在Google Cloud上创建、评估和部署AI代理的专家，值得关注因为它简化了AI代理的开发流程并深度集成谷歌云服务。

name: supervision
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        roboflow /

      supervision  

    
      We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜
summary: 该项目提供可复用的计算机视觉工具库，能大幅简化目标检测、跟踪等任务中的标注处理与结果可视化流程，值得关注因为它显著提升了开发效率并统一了常用功能接口。

name: AI-For-Beginners
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        microsoft /

      AI-For-Beginners  

    
      12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!
summary: 这是一个为期12周、包含24课的微软开源AI入门课程，以Jupyter Notebook形式系统讲解人工智能核心概念与实践，适合零基础学习者，因其结构清晰、内容全面且来自权威技术团队而值得关注。

name: lingbot-map
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Robbyant /

      lingbot-map  

    
      A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data
summary: 这是一个用于从流数据中重建三维场景的前馈基础模型，它能够高效处理实时数据流并构建三维场景，值得关注是因为它为动态环境下的三维重建提供了高效的解决方案。

name: Instatic

Star
